name: Red Snapper with Lemon Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk into a shallow bowl.
2. Place the flour, salt and pepper in a separate dish.
3. Dip each fish fillet first into the milk, then coat it with the flour mixture.
4. Heat oil to medium-high heat in a large skillet.
5. Cook the fish for 90 seconds on one side until golden-brown.
6. Flip the fish over and cook another 90 seconds.
7. Remove the fish from the skillet and set aside. Discard the remaining oil.
8. Add butter to the skillet and cook until it turns hazelnut-brown.
9. Stir in garlic, lemon juice, and parsley. Cook for 30 seconds.
10. Pour the sauce over the fish just before serving.
